title: Integrate Jira project into monday.com
excerpt:

posts.author: Aysha1 (Aysha Mohammad)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi
I was trying to integrate Jira project which is little big project contained almost 900 issues including Task and Subtask. when I tried to integrate, there is error on my jira that too many request. and is it possible to get the same project on monday. For example all subtask will be subtask linked with the task in monday as well.
please help, thank you so much

posts.author: eman (Michael Emanowicz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Aysha!

I think using the Issue Sync app could solve the problem. This tool enables for a robust, two-way synchronization between Jira Cloud and monday.com. It can handle the all the big projects such as yours, supports various fields and is very flexible in terms of the scope of the integration. Give it a try
